title: lupinus albifrons subsp. eminens
intro: Lupinus albifrons subsp. eminens, also known as the white bush lupine or white lupin, is a flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. It is a perennial shrub with white flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lupinus albifrons subsp. eminens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to make a range of products, including supplements and topical creams.
